content.mainTitle: Convert YouTube to MP3 at high quality
content.intro1: Looking for "y2mate" to extract audio? This Y2mate MP3 converter focuses on YouTube only and delivers fast, stable conversion in your browser-no app, no account.
content.intro2: Pick the bitrate that fits your needs: MP3 128/192/320kbps. There's no file size limit and conversions are optimized for long videos such as podcasts, lectures, and mixes.

instructions.title: How to convert YouTube to MP3
steps: Paste a YouTube link (or enter a keyword) into the box.
Click Start to analyze the video.

items.question: What is Y2mate MP3 Converter?
items.answer: Y2mate is a free browser-based tool that extracts audio from YouTube videos and converts them to MP3 format. Choose from 128kbps, 192kbps, or 320kbps bitrates to balance file size and audio quality. Perfect for creating music playlists, podcasts, and offline listening.

items.question: Is Y2mate MP3 conversion free?
items.answer: Absolutely free with zero limitations. Convert unlimited YouTube videos to MP3 without paying, registering, or providing any personal information. All bitrate options (128/192/320kbps) are available for free-no premium tier or subscription required.

items.question: Which bitrate should I pick for music vs speech?
items.answer: For songs, choose 192 or 320kbps for fuller sound. For podcasts/lectures, 128kbps usually balances quality and size well.

items.question: Will converting to MP3 reduce quality?
items.answer: MP3 is lossy. Using 192–320kbps helps preserve more detail, but it cannot exceed the quality of the original upload.

items.question: Why is my MP3 length or size different from the video?
items.answer: Audio tracks can differ slightly from the displayed video length due to source encoding or trimming by the uploader. Higher bitrates produce larger files.

items.question: How can I add cover art and metadata?
items.answer: Cover art and extended tags aren't embedded during conversion. You can add them later with a tag editor app (e.g., Mp3Tag, MusicBrainz Picard).

items.question: Can I convert very long videos or mixes?
items.answer: There's no hard size limit, but very long videos may take more time depending on your connection and device storage.

items.question: Can I trim or split the audio?
items.answer: Trimming/splitting isn't built in. Export the MP3, then use an audio editor app to cut or split tracks as you like.

items.question: Why can't I find some videos?
items.answer: Private, age‑restricted, or region‑blocked videos may not be available. Make sure the link is public and accessible in your region.
